appraisal_events.evidence: Il fredonne imperceptiblement des bribes comme « De ce timide Israëlite / Quoi ! vous guidez ici les pas ! » ou « Champs paternels, Hébron, douce vallée. » pour signifier qu’il a percé les « origines » du patient.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator stages, with discreet irony, Cottard’s procedure that signals, by sung allusions, Jewish origins, which makes him appear heavy, indiscreet, and socially lacking in delicacy.

status_effects.explanation: His coded and mocking attitude toward others’ « origines » makes him locally judged poorly by the narrative frame.
